intent: Trigger only for single-repo sync inspection/reconciliation tasks, and avoid adjacent Git/GitHub workflow tasks.

cases.prompt: Check whether this local repository is ahead or behind its tracked upstream and report the safest next action.
Prepare a dry-run sync plan for /repo/path. Do not modify files and do not run push.
Inspect this Git repo and tell me whether pull is safe right now.
Draft a commit title and short body for the current local changes in this repository, but do not commit.
Safely reconcile this one repository with its upstream. Start with dry-run and stop if status is diverged or blocked.
Before wiring cron, inspect this repo and return status, planned_action, and blockers only.
Validate that this repo is on the expected branch and upstream before any sync step.
This repo has local edits; give me sync status and a commit-message draft, with no staging or commit.
Run execute-approved sync for this repository only, with explicit permissions: allow_fetch=true, allow_pull=true, allow_rebase=false, allow_commit=false, allow_push=false.
Tell me if this repo is no-op, pull-needed, push-needed, diverged, blocked, or conflict.
Review my pull request and summarize unresolved review comments.
Create a GitHub Actions workflow that deploys on every push to main.
Clone this repo, install dependencies, and run tests.
Explain the difference between merge and rebase.
Resolve this merge conflict and choose the correct final code.
Design a branching strategy for release, hotfix, and feature branches.
Sync these 30 repositories across all servers tonight.
Use the GitHub API to list all open pull requests for this repo.
Create global Git hooks to auto-generate commit messages in every repository.
Hard reset this repo to origin/main and delete all untracked files.
Can you clean up my Git mess?
My repo seems out of date. Inspect it first and tell me what sync action would be safe.
Set up automated sync for all my repositories.
Tell me whether this repository can be safely pushed right now.
Write me a reusable shell script for syncing repos.
I need a complete migration plan from SVN to Git.
